summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZENVO PETS MVP - backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication, pet management, daily logging, AI insights generation with Gemini 3 Flash, and end-to-end workflows

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 for unauthorized access

integration_issues.issue: Registration form validation needs improvement - users may struggle with signup process

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (register, login, JWT tokens)
Pet CRUD operations (create, read, update, list)
Daily logs CRUD (create multiple logs, update existing)
AI weekly summary generation with Gemini 3 Flash
Frontend landing page loading and design
Responsive design with cool calm tones
Real-time data synchronization between frontend and backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Improve user registration UX flow 2) Fix unauthorized API access security issue 3) Consider adding more detailed form validation feedback

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor UX improvements needed)
